generated_oml:
// C10: Models/Data
instance SysMLFunctionalArchitectureModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML functional architecture represented by component- and connector-level diagrams (e.g., IBDs) defined in the MBSE framework."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MBSEToolchain
]

instance SysMLLogicalArchitectureModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML logical architecture model visualized through SysML diagrams capturing system functionality and interaction."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MBSEToolchain
]

instance SysMLStateMachineBehaviorModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML behavior model expressed as state machines to describe dynamic behavior of system components."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MBSEToolchain
]

instance ACMEStructuralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ACME architecture description capturing structural relationships between software and hardware components."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MBSEToolchain
]

instance AADLStructuralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "AADL (Architecture Analysis & Design Language) model for system structure and timing analysis."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MBSEToolchain
]

instance MontiArcBehavioralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MontiArc model detailing component-based behavior using ADL."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MBSEToolchain
]

instance MontiArcAutomatonBehavioralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MontiArc Automaton model for finite state machine representation of component behavior."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MBSEToolchain
]

instance SimulinkSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Detailed Simulink-generated simulation model serving as an analytical representation of system dynamics."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationExecutionEnvironment
]

instance CppCodeImplementationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "C++ code model for runtime implementation of system components derived from MBSE artifacts."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CodeDeploymentEnvironment
]

instance JavaCodeImplementationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Java code model for runtime implementation of system components mapped from design models."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CodeDeploymentEnvironment
]

// Data now
instance ArchitectureArtifactsData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Artifacts produced from SysML architecture models (components, connectors, diagrams)."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MBSEToolchain
]

instance BehavioralArtifactsData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Behavioral artifacts derived from SysML state machines and MontiArc behavior models."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MBSEToolchain
]

instance SimulationArtifactsData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulation outputs and analytical data generated by Simulink models."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationExecutionEnvironment
]

instance ContextualDataTraces : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Aggregated contextual data traces from multiple sources integrated into the MBSE toolchain."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MBSEToolchain
]

instance CodeDeploymentMetadata : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Metadata required for deploying C++ and Java implementation models."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CodeDeploymentEnvironment
]

// C11: Enablers
instance MBSEToolchain : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Overarching model-based systems engineering toolchain coordinating SysML, ADL, Simulink, and code generation."
    DTDFVocab:enables DigitalTwinIntegrationService
]

instance SimulationExecutionEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Runtime environment for executing Simulink simulation models and evaluating analytical results."
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationExecutionService
]

instance CodeDeploymentEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Deployment platform for compiling and running C++ and Java code derived from models."
    DTDFVocab:enables CodeDeploymentService
]

// C6: Services
instance DigitalTwinIntegrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that integrates heterogeneous modeling notations into a unified digital twin instance."
    DTDFVocab:provides IntegrationInsight
]

instance SimulationExecutionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that executes Simulink simulations and provides analytical outputs."
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationResultInsight
]

instance CodeDeploymentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that handles compile, deployment, and execution of runtime code implementations."
    DTDFVocab:provides CodeDeploymentInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance IntegrationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight on the completeness and consistency of integrated models across SysML, ADL, and Simulink."
]

instance SimulationResultInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight detailing the performance and stability results of executed simulations."
]

instance CodeDeploymentInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight indicating deployment readiness and runtime compatibility of generated code."
]
